title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Nalco - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Nalco - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Nalco is actively seeking a talented and motivated Process Engineer to join our dynamic team in Vadodara. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Nalco:
Nalco is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nalco!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
